title: Suki Gifts, 'Fang' Galaxy Bat, Purple and Yellow Plush Toy, 17cm, 14396

features: Suki Gifts, 'Fang' Galaxy Bat, Purple and Yellow Plush Toy, 17cm, 14396
Stripy belly which glows in the dark
Wings can be open or fastened around their body with the sticky tab
Cosmic lining on inside of wings
description: Suki's Galaxy Bats are totally out of this world! These colourful creatures all have stripy bellies that glow in the dark and oversized eyes – even the backpack clips!! Keep them Cosy by fastening their wings around their bodies with the Velcro tab or leave them open to show off their cosmic side.
